title: Resolution approving and adopting the Gender and Development (GAD) Focal Point System Resolution No. 19-04, dated July 5, 2019, entitled ?Resolution approving the reversion of funds amounting to One Hundred Sixty Eight Thousand Pesos (P168,000.00) to be taken from the Personal Services (PS) of the Barangay Violence Against Women (VAW) Desk Officer under 5% Gender and Development Fund for CY 2019 to Maintenance and Other Operating Expenses (MOOE) of the same program for various expenses.?
